category_3_note: Physicians holding specialization degree NOT listed in Category 1 or 2 will be considered under Category 3. Requirements: (1) Certificate of structured postgraduate training ≥3 years + passing exit/board exam, (2) 3 years clinical experience after postgraduate degree from Gov/Semi-Gov or Training Hospitals, (3) Passing DHP qualifying exam.
